title: Departure of Seafarers. The Department, through the Migrant Workers
content: 41 Airport Assistance Center (MWAAC), shall monitor all departing seafarers at the 42 international airports and other exit points in the country to ensure that they are properly 43 documented before proceeding to their assigned ship. 44 45
